user.title: Notify HA Plus
user.description:
Set up the group-aware notification dispatcher.

After setup, click **Configure** on the integration card to add persons, devices and groups.

setup_menu.title: Set up Notify HA Plus
setup_menu.description: Add persons and devices now. You can change everything later via Configure.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Notify HA Plus is already configured.

data_description.device_tracker_entity: An existing device_tracker entity (e.g. from a router/Nmap/UniFi/FRITZ!Box integration) used in addition to the person entity's state to decide 'home'/'away'.

volume_settings.title: Alexa volume settings
volume_settings.description: Volume levels for Alexa (0.0 – 1.0) and the Android notification channel used for silent notifications.

error.person_already_added: This person has already been added.
error.no_targets: No persons or devices configured yet.

send_notification.name: Send notification
send_notification.description: Sends a notification to one or more Notify HA Plus targets.

target.name: Target
target.description: One or more Notify HA Plus target entities (persons, groups, or presence-based targets).

image_path.name: Image
image_path.description: Optional path to a JPEG/PNG image.

video_path.name: Video
video_path.description: Optional path to an MP4 video.

live_stream_url.name: Live stream URL
live_stream_url.description: Optional RTSP/MJPEG link as action button.

dashboard_url.name: Dashboard URL
dashboard_url.description: Optional link to a dashboard view as action button.

tag.name: Tag (per clear_notification)
tag.description: Identifier for later clearing this notification.

critical.name: Critical
critical.description: Critical/interruptive notification with raised Alexa volume.
